<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="vi"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Scalendar - Login</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Newsreader:ital,opsz,wght@0,6..72,200..800;1,6..72,200..800&amp;family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:ital,wght@0,200..800;1,200..800&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
          darkMode: "class",
          theme: {
            extend: {
              "colors": {
                      "on-tertiary-fixed": "#2e1507",
                      "inverse-surface": "#30312e",
                      "on-tertiary-container": "#4e3020",
                      "error": "#ba1a1a",
                      "inverse-on-surface": "#f2f1ec",
                      "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                      "background": "#fbf9f4",
                      "on-secondary-fixed": "#2c1600",
                      "on-primary-fixed": "#07200f",
                      "outline": "#737972",
                      "secondary": "#7d562d",
                      "primary-fixed-dim": "#b0ceb2",
                      "tertiary-container": "#c29782",
                      "outline-variant": "#c2c8c0",
                      "on-surface": "#1b1c19",
                      "surface-container-highest": "#e4e2dd",
                      "secondary-container": "#ffca98",
                      "on-surface-variant": "#424842",
                      "on-background": "#1b1c19",
                      "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                      "tertiary": "#7a5644",
                      "tertiary-fixed": "#ffdbcb",
                      "surface-dim": "#dbdad5",
                      "on-primary-container": "#233d29",
                      "surface": "#fbf9f4",
                      "primary": "#4a654e",
                      "inverse-primary": "#b0ceb2",
                      "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                      "surface-variant": "#e4e2dd",
                      "secondary-fixed": "#ffdcbd",
                      "surface-bright": "#fbf9f4",
                      "surface-container": "#f0eee9",
                      "surface-container-low": "#f5f3ee",
                      "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#ebbda6",
                      "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                      "primary-fixed": "#cceace",
                      "surface-container-high": "#eae8e3",
                      "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#603f2f",
                      "surface-tint": "#4a654e",
                      "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#623f18",
                      "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                      "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                      "on-secondary-container": "#7a532a",
                      "primary-container": "#8ba88e",
                      "on-error": "#ffffff",
                      "secondary-fixed-dim": "#f0bd8b",
                      "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#334d38"
              },
              "borderRadius": {
                      "DEFAULT": "0.25rem",
                      "lg": "0.5rem",
                      "xl": "0.75rem",
                      "full": "9999px"
              },
              "spacing": {
                      "sm": "8px",
                      "container-margin": "20px",
                      "gutter": "12px",
                      "xl": "40px",
                      "md": "16px",
                      "lg": "24px",
                      "xs": "4px",
                      "unit": "4px"
              },
              "fontFamily": {
                      "body-md": [
                              "Plus Jakarta Sans"
                      ],
                      "title-lg": [
                              "Plus Jakarta Sans"
                      ],
                      "display-lg": [
                              "Newsreader"
                      ],
                      "headline-md": [
                              "Newsreader"
                      ],
                      "label-sm": [
                              "Plus Jakarta Sans"
                      ]
              },
              "fontSize": {
                      "body-md": [
                              "16px",
                              {
                                      "lineHeight": "24px",
                                      "fontWeight": "400"
                              }
                      ],
                      "title-lg": [
                              "20px",
                              {
                                      "lineHeight": "28px",
                                      "fontWeight": "600"
                              }
                      ],
                      "display-lg": [
                              "40px",
                              {
                                      "lineHeight": "48px",
                                      "letterSpacing": "-0.02em",
                                      "fontWeight": "600"
                              }
                      ],
                      "headline-md": [
                              "28px",
                              {
                                      "lineHeight": "36px",
                                      "fontWeight": "500"
                              }
                      ],
                      "label-sm": [
                              "12px",
                              {
                                      "lineHeight": "16px",
                                      "letterSpacing": "0.05em",
                                      "fontWeight": "500"
                              }
                      ]
              }
      },
          },
        }
      </script>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-surface text-on-surface font-body-md min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-gutter"><div class="absolute top-0 left-0 p-lg">
<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Scalendar Brand Logo" class="w-8 h-8 opacity-90">
</div>
<!-- Top: Logo -->
<div class="mb-xl text-center">
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-surface-container-high rounded-xl mx-auto flex items-center justify-center mb-md border border-outline-variant/30">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-[32px]">calendar_month</span>
</div>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-secondary">Scalendar</h1>
</div>
<!-- Center: Content Card -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-low rounded-xl p-lg w-full max-w-sm text-center border border-outline-variant/30 relative">
<div class="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-[1px] bg-outline-variant/20 mx-4 mt-8"></div>
<div class="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-[1px] bg-outline-variant/20 mx-4 mt-16"></div>
<div class="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-[1px] bg-outline-variant/20 mx-4 mt-24"></div>
<h2 class="font-display-lg text-display-lg text-primary mb-md relative z-10 pt-4">Lưu lịch của bạn</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant relative z-10 mb-xl">Đăng nhập để đồng bộ trên nhiều thiết bị</p>
<!-- Bottom: Actions -->
<div class="space-y-md relative z-10">
<button class="w-full bg-surface-container-lowest text-on-surface font-title-lg text-title-lg py-md px-lg rounded-full border border-outline-variant/30 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(74,101,78,0.05)] hover:bg-surface-container transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-sm">
<svg class="w-6 h-6" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
<path d="M22.56 12.25c0-.78-.07-1.53-.2-2.25H12v4.26h5.92c-.26 1.37-1.04 2.53-2.21 3.31v2.77h3.57c2.08-1.92 3.28-4.74 3.28-8.09z" fill="#4285F4"></path>
<path d="M12 23c2.97 0 5.46-.98 7.28-2.66l-3.57-2.77c-.98.66-2.23 1.06-3.71 1.06-2.86 0-5.29-1.93-6.16-4.53H2.18v2.84C3.99 20.53 7.7 23 12 23z" fill="#34A853"></path>
<path d="M5.84 14.09c-.22-.66-.35-1.36-.35-2.09s.13-1.43.35-2.09V7.07H2.18C1.43 8.55 1 10.22 1 12s.43 3.45 1.18 4.93l2.85-2.22.81-.62z" fill="#FBBC05"></path>
<path d="M12 5.38c1.62 0 3.06.56 4.21 1.64l3.15-3.15C17.45 2.09 14.97 1 12 1 7.7 1 3.99 3.47 2.18 7.07l3.66 2.84c.87-2.6 3.3-4.53 6.16-4.53z" fill="#EA4335"></path>
</svg>
                Tiếp tục với Google
            </button>
<button class="w-full text-on-surface-variant font-label-sm text-label-sm py-sm hover:text-on-surface transition-colors uppercase tracking-wider">
                Dùng không cần tài khoản
            </button>
</div>
</div>


</body></html>
